name: Tanac Automation Co., Ltd.
summary: Tanac Automation Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of integrated automation systems and solutions worldwide. The company primary products include winding automation equipment, non-standard automation equipment, assembly automation equipment, test automation equipment, automation equipment, industrial robot application, intelligent factory, and others under the TANAC brand. It also provides after sale services. The company provides customized solutions for transformer inductance, machine manufacturing, consumer electronics manufacturing, automobile, household appliance, medical, and logistics industries. Tanac Automation Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Jiashan, China.
